title: Mannheim, Baden-Württemberg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mannheim, Baden-Württemberg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mannheim is a city in Baden-Württemberg with a population of 310,000. A grid-planned city at the confluence of Rhine and Neckar, a major industrial and logistics hub with a vibrant multicultural atmosphere.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
